error_signature: sub-workflow does not return data from nodes with wait functionality
title: Sub-workflow fails to return data from Slack Send and Wait node
symptom: The Slack Send and Wait node in a sub-workflow does not send its response back to the main workflow. The output log shows only the parameters passed from the AI agent, not the response from the Slack node.
applies_when: Using Slack Send and Wait node
Node is part of a sub-workflow
not_this_if: Using a different node without wait functionality
root_cause: This issue arises because nodes with wait functionality in a sub-workflow do not return data back to the main workflow. This is a known bug that affects how data is passed between workflows in n8n.
fix_steps: Upgrade n8n to version 2.0.0 or higher
Re-test the workflow to ensure the response is now returned correctly
agent_instruction: Upgrade n8n to version 2.0.0 or higher to resolve the issue.
